entry.title: Re: Production Order Child Item is another BoM's Parent I...
entry.content: If you want a calculation, run MRP wizard. The wizard will calculate all components in multiple level BOM.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Football Pet(Atletico de Madrid)

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content: My name is PHAM VAN CUONG from Vietnam, and I am currently working in the logistics field as an operations staff. When working with partners, I had the chance to learn about the advanced ERP system SAP S/4HANA and I found that modern technologies have really transformed the way that we live and work nowadays. In order to keep up with technology, I really want to learn about SAP S/4HANA modules to upgrade my working skills and change my career in the future. I hope that I can claim one of the SAP Certification vouchers. Please let me know how I can obtain the free certificate at this time. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
Download PDF from adobe form in local system from SAP ODATA backend code in SEGW
entry.content:
The bottom code is working fine in SE38 include program but it failing in segw OData backend code with

sy-subrc = 21[control_flush_error] 

CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_download
          EXPORTING
            filename                = lv_filename
            filetype                  = 'BIN'
          CHANGING
            data_tab                = lt_pdf
          EXCEPTIONS
            control_flush_error          = 21
            not_supported_by_gui    = 22
            error_no_gui                    = 23
            OTHERS                          = 24.

how can we download the adobe form output pdf in local system in odata backend code via SEGW.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio releases
entry.content:
@Manuelli, we always send e-mails to our customer database inviting them to our release preview webcast, typically hosted a week before the official release date, and also, at the release date, we send another email with all the release highlights; if you would like to share in a private chat your email address. I would make sure you are part of the distribution list. Alternatively, check your spam; the mail comes from the SAP Signavio Team <signavio_success@sap.com>.

Another recommendation is to stay tuned to the SAP Signavio Topic Page, where we always announce events on the carousel tab, or check signavio.com > Events for the preview webcast details. We also publish blog posts with all the release features on both channels at the release date.

I have provided feedback to the team to create a central place with all the dates for 2025 releases. Meanwhile, our Q4 release will take place on Nov 06, and the preview webcast will be on Oct 30. As soon as registration is available, we'll share the links by email and the channels mentioned above. 

Let me know if you have any other questions. Enjoy the weekend!

entry.title: Re: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content:
hi @Sandra_Rossi 

ok thank you, is there also a way to add the field without modifying the RIHAFVR structure?

I tried to add the field, but I get the following error:

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
I am Jignesh Mehta. 

I work as a SAP Sales & Distribution Consultant. I started learning SAP back in 2006. I am active on the SDN / SCN Forum since 2007 and initially I was here to learn and lately I am here to share and keep my knowledge brushed up... 

Originally from India I am now living and settled in Germany working as a part of In-House Team of a large corporation. 

Outside of work, I love biking and I am soon going to join a fitness studio to maintain (& build) lean body mass before it is too late... :). 

Thanks,

entry.title: Accounting Determination for Credit Memo in Portuguese Scenario
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

In the Portuguese scenario, when I need to cancel an invoice that has already been sent to the customer, it is necessary to create a Credit Memo to reverse the invoice.

The issue is that for Credit Memos, a different G/L account must be used to comply with legal requirements in Portugal. Credit Memo Invoices must be associated with a "Discounts and Rebates" account, depending on the VAT.

In the configuration for Automatic Account Determination, I used the condition table 017 - Sales Org./Item Cat./Acct Key to determine the G/L account for the item category related to the Credit Memo process. This works for revenue but not for taxes.

Where can I change the account determination for taxes in this case?

Best regards,
Alynne.

entry.title: Re: Real Talk with Claire | Application Development & Automation Track Lead
entry.content: Thanks for such a nice blog @chingweitseng ! Even though my background is mostly functional (SD & MM), I love programming and SAP Build is something I felt in love with since day 1. Now with GenAI, the sky is the limit! Looking forward to see what are the new features in TechEd.

entry.title: LMS Calendar invites
entry.content:
Hi!

we are having some issues where users are missing the calendar invite for classes they sign up for in LMS. because they come in separate emails. When a user registers for a class in LMS, they will receive 3 email notifications below, we have "Enable Vcalendar attachments" and "Send Vcalendar attachments as calendar invite" Turned on in our system 

  1. AMD Training: Notification of Registration / Enrollment
  2. Calendar invites to book your calendar
  3. The ics file in a separate email 

Three emails for one class is a bit much.. Ideally would be registration email with calendar invite/ in one email without the .ics attachment, and also the ability to customize the calendar invite to include teams link at class level would be useful. Different classes will have a different link. do we have any options to consolidate these notifications?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere basic trial - login issue
entry.content:
Hi

I can't login with below details and I getting session ended with in a second.

Thanks for your interest in SAP Datasphere! You’ve just taken your first step towards unleashing the power of your business data.

First things first, here are your account details:

Your User ID: GE118697
Your Password: ObB58a7GbV1!

We’ve also included a guide with some helpful steps as you’re getting started.

You will have access to this basic trial for 30 days.

Over the next month, we’ll be checking in with a few tips and reminders to help you get the most from your basic trial.

Thanks,

Kanna.

entry.title: Hello
entry.content: Hey Everyone

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi all, I am from Malaysia, currently living in British Columbia, Canada. Once again thank you for creating this wonderful community platform, I am looking forward to connect with others from BC, Canada.

entry.title: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content:
Attachments added via the API and the SAP user interface to a to a supplier invoice are only visible one by one with this parameter:

/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/GetAllOriginals?BusinessObjectTypeName='BKPF'&LinkedSAPObjectKey='123 10000000272024'

How can I retrieve the list of all attachments? When I try this via Postman:

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/GetSAPObjectDocumentType?SAPObjectType='BKPF'

It returns empty because "SAPObjectType": "" for the uploaded attachments.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: You didn't give any debug details, did you? As I said, you can see by debug that after leaving the selection screen, you go back to ZPROGRAM1 directly after CALL TRANSACTION 'ZUPLOADRPA' in the PAI of the screen 400, and after the PAI of the screen 400 it goes to the PBO of the screen 400 and displays it. If not, please explain what you see during your debug.

entry.title: Re: diference between SAP C user Id and S user Id
entry.content: Bro dont misguide people. Its ur time waste also my time waste by reading ur reply.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: This is my rubber duck I use when debugging 🙂

entry.title: Re: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content: I've used the attachment API to retrieve the list of attachments with the GetAllOriginals function.

entry.title: Re: Generate eDocument from old invoices : SAP DRC Romania
entry.content: Hello Folks this is not the correct way, please note this has to be done in he EDOC_COCKPIT, so here you have to create a variant and in that you have to tick the check box of not yet created, proivide all the details like date range and if more required you can give the document type and fiscal year, etc, click on execute and you will get the list of invoices if it is eligible it will show you as created and than select those documents and click on create icon at the top of that table, till will create e-docs and it will be visible in cockpit.

entry.title: Two-Tier ERP Master Data Replication Options
entry.content:
SAP Two-Tier ERP Integration

Integration is essential in Two-Tier scenarios. A comprehensive understanding of end-to-end business processes, including both master data and transactional data flows, is crucial for ensuring customer success. It's important to identify and address integration requirements early in the process. SAP S/4HANA Cloud will also need to be integrated with various other solutions within the customer's system landscape.

Data is broadly categorised as three areas. Master data, Transactional data, and Configuration data. Here in this blog we will be looking at master data replication options for Two-Tier ERP.

Master Data Replication

Master data is the core data that is absolutely essential for running operations within a business enterprise or unit. It is data about key business entities that provides context for business transactions and operations.

Master data replication between headquarters and subsidiaries is essential for following reasons:

  • Data Consistency: Ensures that both headquarters and subsidiaries have access to the same up-to-date information, minimizing discrepancies and errors in data.
  • Improved Decision Making: Provides a unified view of critical business information, facilitating more informed and accurate decision-making across the entire organization.
  • Operational Efficiency: Streamlines processes and operations by maintaining synchronized data, reducing the need for manual data entry and reconciliation.
  • Enhanced Collaboration: Promotes better collaboration between headquarters and subsidiaries by ensuring everyone is working with the same set of data.
  • Regulatory Compliance: Helps in maintaining compliance with regulatory requirements by ensuring that all parts of the organization adhere to the same standards and data practices.
  • Cost Savings: Reduces costs associated with data management, storage, and maintenance by avoiding duplicate efforts and ensuring data is only entered once.
  • Customer Satisfaction: Ensures that customer information is consistent and accurate across all touchpoints, leading to improved customer service and satisfaction.

Master Data Replication Option 1 - Master Data Integration (MDI)

Customers with following cases should opt for MDI

  • Customers with Headquarter in private cloud and multiple subsidiaries in public cloud
  • Customers utilizes other SAP cloud solutions or non-SAP solutions that needed integration
  • Customers with requirement to harmonize master data across their system landscape
  • Customers who have business technology platform account

Master Data Integration (MDI)

The SAP Master Data Integration service is a cloud service that enables you to handle distributed and federated sets of master data in a heterogenous landscape. Thus, SAP Master Data Integration is the central point for master data integration with the Intelligent Suite.

The service uses SAP One Domain Model as the exchange format to achieve a consistent view of master data across end-to-end business processes in the integrated Intelligent Suite.

SAP Master Data Integration provides reliable real-time replication in a hub-and-spoke approach. This allows every business application to have its own copy of the relevant master data.

 

                                                                                                       

MDI guiding principles

 Central Integration Point

MDI follows central integration point, often called a hub-and-spoke model, MDI acts as centralized system (hub) to manage data exchanges between multiple systems (spokes). Instead of connecting systems directly to each other which comes with centralised management, scalability, reduced complexity, and easy error handling.

One Domain Model

The SAP One Domain Model is an integrated data model that standardizes the representation of business objects across the SAP ecosystem. ODM ensures that these business objects are defined consistently across all SAP applications, including SAP S/4HANA, SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Ariba, and others.

ODM decouples from application specifics, provides well defined semantics for business objects.

 

Predefined Integration Flows

Predefined Integration Flows are ready-to-use, out-of-the-box integration scenarios designed to connect different systems efficiently. These flows are created based on best practices and include mappings, transformations, and communication settings, reducing the time and complexity involved in building custom integrations. They ensure a seamless exchange of data between applications like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and Ariba.

Master Data Replication Option 2 – Data Replication Framework

Customers with following cases should opt for MDI

  • Customers with Headquarter in private cloud and subsidiaries in public cloud
  • Customers has requirement to integrate only S/4 solutions
  • Customers with simple landscape

Data Replication Framework

  • The Data Replication Framework (DRF) is a local business object change event processor that decides which business object instances will be replicated to defined target systems. 
  • The DRF is complemented by the key mapping framework and the value mapping framework to support non-harmonised identifiers and code lists.
  • DRF is hosted on SAP S/4HANA OP which doesn’t require additional license
  • Applicable only for SAP S/4HANA applications

The options presented here are not the only approaches to data replication, but they represent the most relevant and prioritized solutions.

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?

entry.title: Re: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content:
The response from GetAllOriginals only concerns a single LinkedSAPObjectKey. I would like to retrieve all attachments for all the documents.

Is there something I might be missing? Thank you for your help, I appreciate it."

entry.title: Re: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content: There isn't an API to look at all attachments, you must designate which business object is of interest.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Application for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I would like to know if we can enable or connect any service and access SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud System through mobile phone using SAP application.

As I am aware we can access the system using our Internet Mobile Applications like chrome, safari etc., but can we connect our system with SAP application and access it and perform our daily tasks and activity?

Would appreciate all the responses that can help me on same. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service

entry.title: Re: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content: Would a CDS view be a solution to retrieve documents and their attachments?

entry.title: Re: JZ00L: Login failed. Examine the SQLWarnings chained to this exception for the reason(s).
entry.content: for me, this error was coming while accessing ASE database . When we had disabled the password encryption then this error has gone away. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Fiori standard application similar to transaction FB7...
entry.content:
Dear mredula,

The easiest way to find a fiori app for a standard t code is to execute t code /n/ui2/flp from SAP screen. It will open the fiori app page. Please enter the standard t code in the app finder on the top. You can then add it into your favorites.

Thanks
Avnish

entry.title: Re: NSQ Meetup on Thu, Sept 26 - Who is in / Where to meet?
entry.content: It was great to hang out with folks in NSQ @caseydevlin @jerryjanda @craigcmehil@jimjaquet

entry.title: What’s new for regulatory changes (AUSAPE onsite workshop in Madrid)
entry.content:
Regulatory changes have a significant influence on industries and businesses, and can impact everything from operating costs to market competitiveness and consumer trust. 

Learn about the latest regulatory changes and enhancements from Gema Moraleda, Local Product Manager at SAP for Human Experience Management. Hear directly from SAPIMSA, SAP partner, about the migration to SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA.

Explore the agenda and find out more interesting sessions on successful migration use cases!

Registration link

entry.title: Re: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content: This error happens because you use TYPES, but you should use DATA here. It seems that you have tried "DATA ztest TYPE ztest" so I guess that it didn't work, what error message did you get?

CU

Michael

#petoberfest #devtoberfest

entry.title: What’s new for regulatory changes (AUSAPE onsite workshop in Barcelona)
entry.content:
Companies and organisations need to stay abreast of regulatory changes and adapt their operations to remain compliant and competitive in the face of evolving regulatory landscapes.

Would you like to know about the enhancements made in the last month? Do you have any questions about Human Capital Management solution from SAP? Are you curious about migration to SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA (SAPIMSA, SAP partner)?

Visit the onsite AUSAPE event in Barcelona and join the presentation of Gema Moraleda, Local Product Manager at SAP for Human Experience Management. 

Explore the agenda and find out more interesting sessions on successful migration use cases!

Registration link

entry.title: Adding Standard MARA/MARC fields for CRUD operation in API_PRODUCT_SRV
entry.content:
Hi Community Members, 

I am working on a requirement to extend API_PRODUCT_SRV (on-Prem) with few missing standard MARA & MARC fields (Not the Z-FIelds) listed below.

Field NameReference Table
RMATP_PBMARA
PROD_SHAPEMARA
MO_PROFILE_IDMARA
OVERHANG_TRESHMARA
SCM_HEUR_IDMARC
SCM_MATURITY_DURMARA
SCM_SHLF_LFE_REQ_MAXMARA
USEQUMARC
SHFLGMARC

I extended associated CDS entities like A_PRODUCT, A_ProductPlant etc with the respective fields from MARA & MARC and able to get the fields in Payload.

GET call works fine for these newly added fields however, CREATE & UPDATE operation is not working and these fields are not updated in the table. Also, I could not find any BADI to map these fields during create/Update. 

Really appreciate any suggestions on this issue. Thanks in advance.   

Pradeep

ABAP Extensibility API OData SAP Gateway 

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
Re: Report to view purchase orders and corresponding invo...
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am not sure if you got this answer, but this is the best you can do with your standard access. 

Like mentioned by others you might need to download multiple reports. 

ME2N - PO Report 

ME80FN - Invoice Document Number 

FBL1N - Invoice received Date, Invoice Posted Date, Invoice due Date, Payment date and Ne Due date according to your payment setup with the Supplier (for this you need Vendor account number, not the Vendor code used while creating a PO) 

Combination of these three will give you what you need, if you are going to doing this report frequently, I would suggest creating a custom report. 

Hope this helps

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Please note that while we are publishing contest activities on Friday, September 27th; many badge assignments won't be active in the system until Monday, September 30th.  If you happen to complete a contest activity before the badge is active, that's OK. You'll still get credit for it. It just won't show up in your gameboard totals until the new badges are activated and assigned.

If you are looking for Week 1 activities, they can be found here: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities - SAP Community

Welcome to Devtoberfest 2024! We are back again this year with 4 weeks of fun and learning! Starting on September 23rd you can take part in the Devtoberfest contest (CONTEST OFFICIAL RULES HERE) and collect points for tutorials, quizzes and live sessions! Collect as many points as possible until the 25th of October and qualify for prizes such a trip to next year's SAP TechEd in person experience! For general information check out the overview about taking part in the contest here: Devtoberfest Contest - SAP Community Groups 

The table below shows you the points you can earn in the second week of Devtoberfest! Every week we will post an update with the new activities that will get you points in the contest! Each activity will earn you a badge applied to your SAP Community ID and points that you can track on the “for fun only” Devtoberfest Gameboard. The scavenger hunt is also back this year! The tutorials, quizzes and fun activities to earn even more points as part of the scavenger hunt will be posted here in week 3. And don't forget about Fun Friday Activities.  This week's Fun Friday activity will be Techtoberfest - Use this opportunity to show off your coding setup. This could be your desk, office, or even your favorite development tools.

List of activities for contest week 2: 

DAYBADGE CODECONTENTPOINTS
Monday   
Monday#AEC2D3Devtoberfest 2024 - ABAP, Week 2, Sept. 301200
Monday#9AD6C0Get to Know SAP BTP, ABAP Environment150
Monday#6E4046Create an ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) View in SAP BTP, ABAP Environment450
Monday#A28668Enhance an ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) View in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) ABAP Environment600
Monday#5D5859Create Business Configuration Maintenance Object300
Monday#7662BEDevtoberfest 2024 - CAP, Week 2, Sept. 301200
Monday#E1B446Introduction to Application Development Using CAP70
Monday#D8EAFESet Up SAP Business Application Studio200
Monday#010101Build a CAP Application300
Monday#FAFAFAAdd SAP Fiori Elements UIs 300
Monday#E9E8F0Add Custom Logic100
Tuesday   
Tuesday#201926Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling, Week 2, Oct. 11200
Tuesday#99CEF1Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling, Watch DMS Video300
Tuesday#DC879BSetup SAP Build Code in SAP BTP100
Tuesday#212327Create a Full-Stack Application with SAP Fiori UI using Joule in SAP Build Code300
Tuesday#C3516FSubscribe to SAP Build Process Automation150
Tuesday#BA61B3Create a Business Process100
Tuesday#A8416DCreate and Configure Forms250
Tuesday#905335Create a Process Condition100
Tuesday#19E5E5Run the Business Process150
Wednesday   
Wednesday#1B573DDevtoberfest 2024 - Integration, Week 2, Oct. 21200
Wednesday#28B07ALearn about SAP Event Mesh100
Wednesday#B894A3Create Instance of SAP Event Mesh150
Wednesday#10302ACreate Queues and Queue Subscriptions for SAP Event Mesh300
Wednesday#030501Send and Receive Test SAP Event Mesh150
Wednesday#C6CAB4Create an Application for Producing Messages200
Wednesday#27302BCreate an Application for Receiving Messages200
Wednesday#62BAC4Create App for Sending and Receiving Messages Using a Java-Based Client450
Thursday   
Thursday#190005Devtoberfest 2024 - MAD (ML, AI & Data), Week 2 - Oct. 32400
Thursday#FEF5F4Use Trial to Set Up Account for Data Attribute Recommendation and Download Postman Sample Files50
Thursday#2A2D30Install Postman REST Client50
Thursday#DAD8D6Set Up Postman to Call Data Attribute Recommendation APIs50
Thursday#FCEDEDUpload Data to Data Attribute Recommendation150
Thursday#D3C4D4Use Data Attribute Recommendation to Train a Machine Learning Model150
Friday   
Friday#53FA4CDevtoberfest 2024 - Frontend, Week 2, Oct. 041200
Friday More Activities being added soon. Please check back.

entry.title: Re: How to avoid flexible workflow restarting when purchase order is modified with a lower net value
entry.content: Hi, did you find a solution?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere basic trial - login issue
entry.content:
Hi 

It looks like you're having trouble logging into SAP Datasphere. Make sure you're using the correct User ID and Password, and check for any typos. If the session ends quickly, try clearing your browser cache or using a different browser.

entry.title: Re: Accounting Determination for Credit Memo in Portugues...
entry.content: Hi  to change the account determination for taxes related to Credit Memos in Portugal, you need to configure the condition table for tax accounts. Use the transaction code OB40 to adjust the tax account determination settings for Credit Memos. Ensure you set up the appropriate condition types and account keys for the specific VAT scenarios.

entry.title: Re: Difference between S/4HANA private cloud vs S/4HANA o...
entry.content: S/4HANA Private Cloud is distinct from on-premise in terms of management and scalability; it offers features like managed upgrades and specific security protocols. While you can expose APIs and set up communication arrangements similarly to the public cloud, the Private Cloud edition still retains some on-premise characteristics, and the Cloud Connector should be installed on your network to facilitate secure connectivity.

entry.title: Re: Adding Standard MARA/MARC fields for CRUD operation i...
entry.content: For CREATE and UPDATE operations, ensure that your extended fields are correctly mapped to the underlying data model using the appropriate BAPIs or enhancement spots for the product entity. If no BADI is found, consider using an enhancement implementation in the relevant service definition to handle the mapping of the new fields.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content: @TheKempe There was an issue on the YouTube side with two of the videos from Tuesday.  Until it can be resolved we have uploaded backup copies of those videos to other URLs.  We are in the process of changing over all the points to the backup versions.

entry.title: Re: Error in globaldefinitons in smartforms
entry.content:
Solved!!!

There are multiple fields which is declared in "Currenct/Quant" Tab. Delete multiples reference and then try activating it. It will work.

entry.title: Is it possible to print automaticaly the Form Template EWM_DLV_NOTE, Output Type DELIVERY_NOTE?
entry.content:
We want to print the Form Template EWM_DLV_NOTE, Output Type DELIVERY_NOTE with Output Parameter Determination. This is possible if you go from the Warehouse Monitor, but we want to print this document automatically from the Output Parameter Determination tile.

Is it possible to print automatically the Form Template EWM_DLV_NOTE, Output Type DELIVERY_NOTE?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to print automaticaly the Form Templat...
entry.content:
Please refer to the SAP Help portal page:

Output Management for Outbound Delivery Orders

"Loading_List" is the only output type for EWM Outbound Delivery, "Delivery NOTE" is the output type for LE shipping outbound delivery.

Form Template EWM_DLV_NOTE  is an EWM template, it is not possible to output delivery notes (LE shipping) with it.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: BODS Meta Data Table for Substitution Parameters/Configuration
entry.content:
Hi all,

I could find the details of the Global variables in this meta data table - AL_SETOPTIONS 

it looks like this table is not storing the details of the Substitution parameters/Config values.

My requirement is to list out all File Formats names in the system which uses some substitute parameters with some pattern Ex: $$BW****

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: Fiori launchpad does not recognize my fiori elements extensions
entry.content: If it is btp workzone where it was deployed, it was done this way because they wanted customization on a standard application and mobility from any device

entry.title: Re: Managing objects owned by another user
entry.content:
SAP IQ supports user defined roles which let you define a custom collection of privileges. You than assign the role that you have defined to the appropriate users. 

User Defined Roles

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi, I’m excited to continue expanding my SAP skills! I’ve completed learning journeys and now looking to further enhance my knowledge.

As I plan to pursue certification, I would greatly appreciate any support, such as a voucher, to assist with this next step. Additionally, I’m curious if there’s a platform where fellow learners and professionals connect? Any guidance on certifications and learning paths would be wonderful as I aim to contribute more to the SAP community and my organization.

entry.title: How can we extract a field as of a specific date in a Bonus Plan eligibility rule?
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are working on Variable Pay template. We have a key driver for an employee to be eligible for a corresponding Bonus Plan, Payout Coefficient, which is a field within PayComponent.

It is possible that this field changes during the year. The requirement is to assign the Bonus Plan based on the value of Payout Coefficient as of 31/3.

How can we approach the creation of the rules ? @xavierlegarrec @pmacgovern any ideas?

Thanks,

Konstantina

entry.title: Insights Cards on S/4HANA Cloud My Home
entry.content:
Hello Community,

My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud follows a modular approach to meet the needs of different roles. Today we are going to learn more about Insights Cards section. 

 

With My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can add analytical, list, and table cards to the entry page. These cards are a part of your overview page, analytical list page, and the list report pages.

Adding a Card to the Insights Cards section:

  1. On the Overview Page, click on "More" 
  2. Select "Add Card to Insights".

You can select a maximum of 10 cards to be displayed within this section. You can rearrange cards using drag and drop directly on the entry page.

The Insights section displays cards with business content that is considered relevant to you.

The integrated SAP cloud business solutions, such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, and SAP SuccessFactors, nominate cards for the Insights section. SAP Start determines which cards are displayed to you based on metadata provided by the integrated solutions, which can include the card's date and its relevance to the user. As a user, you cannot directly influence which cards are displayed.

However, for SAP S/4HANA Cloud content, you can define which cards will be nominated to SAP Start by marking all the cards that you create as visible in the Insights section of My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. For more information, see My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

In case you don't want to have the Insights Cards, you can delete them by following the steps below:

  1. In Fiori Launchpad My Home, scroll down until you find the “Insights” section
  2. Click on the dropdown arrow on the right side of the “Insights” title
  3. Click on “Manage Cards”
  4. You have two options: Hide or Delete.
  5. If you want to hide, you can simply click on the eye button. If the eye button is green, it means that the card is visible. If the eye button is white, it means that the card is hided.
  6. If you want to delete, you need to click on the card
  7. Select the “Delete” button
  8. A dialog box will be opened asking for you to confirm the deletion, once It cannot be reverted. If you really want to proceed, click on “OK” and the card will be deleted.
  9. After applying the changes, click on “Close”

Or, you can also follow the steps below to hide the whole Insights section:

  1. Open Fiori Launchpad
  2. Click on the Profile Icon on the upper right side of the page
  3. Click on "My Home Settings"
  4. In "Layout" tab, choose "Hide" for "Insights Tiles and Cards". 

 

It might be that you are looking for some settings to hide this globally not by every individual users.

Then, apart from the personalization that end users can perform, administrators can also preconfigure the entry page.

As an administrator you can click Adapt UI from the User Actions Menu. The application reloads in runtime adaptation mode. The UI Adaptation mode is selected by default.

To perform the functions described here, you can click within the overlay of the page and select the Personalize My Home option that pops up. From the subsequent My Home Settings dialog you can modify the layout by changing the visibility and the position of the sections on the entry page. This means that you can hide the Insights Tiles and Cards.

Upon making these changes, you must click Save. To activate all the saved changes, click the magic wand icon located in the toolbar at the top. A new version is created every time any changes are made by the administrator. 

Please check SAP Help Portal | Adapting the UI if you want more information before adapting the UI.

 

Hope I could help you to learn more regarding this topic! 🙂

 

Kind regards,

Tayane.

entry.title: Signavio Process Excel Reports - How to See Sequential Paths After Gateways?
entry.content: While attempting to compile a template for Signavio simulation to send to clients to input the necessary information for simulation inputs (assigning costs, time, etc., to all tasks in a process), is it possible to show which tasks branch off from specific gateways before remerging? Can I export an Excel file that lists all BPMN 2.0 element types that also describes which tasks occur following their respective paths of exclusive, parallel, or inclusive gateways, so that there is a clear delineation of what tasks occur on each path? Thank you so much for your help in advance! SAP Signavio

entry.title: WBS - Project with Revenue - Margin Analysis not updated
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have client scenario, wherein as part of purchase Project/WBS need to be used and it need to be settled to Profitability segment.

Considering in Public Cloud only project with project profile "Project with Revenue" can be settled to profitability segment, we planned to use it for above scenario.

But when we are posting Good receipt to WBS with project profile "Project with revenue", values are not updated in margin analysis.

Request you to help with it.

Regards

Sandeep

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

Good afternoon
Dear Experts

How can I increase the decimals in my USD currency, in the SAP S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC environment.

entry.title: AVC Dependencies with type selection condition not available
entry.content:
In the App VC modeling environment during the creation of the dependencies we're not able to choose the dependencies type ''Selection conditions'' , because is grey out. Is it possible to enable this functionality? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: AVC Dependencies with type selection condition not av...
entry.content:
Dependencies of type Selection conditions are to be assigned to characteristic

 

The resource Creating Dependencies for Characteristics outlines how to create these dependencies in the app VC Modeling Environment

entry.title: Re: Close individual SKF from posting
entry.content: Hello , What is a SKF ? If it uses a Product Master Record , have you tried using the Material Status field for blocking ?

entry.title: Re: Error in S4 Hana Public Cloud for Business Partner Re...
entry.content:
Hello @anildeep7 

In the BTP cockpit, navigate to MDI service instance created for S4 Cloud. In the view parameters, check the value of businessSystem maintained.

- This must match with businessSystem of S4. ( CommunicationSystem -> filter by own system -> Business System/Logical System )

See : https://help.sap.com/docs/master-data-integration/sap-master-data-integration-prod/configuring-businesssystemids-for-client-applications?locale=en-US

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Boa tarde @wterceiro , tudo bem?

Realizamos as configurações para integração com motor externo conforme documentação disponibilizada, porém a mesma, parou subitamente.

Criamos um motor provisório para retornar os valores à nossa partner demo do S/4HANA Cloud Public, porém dias após conseguirmos visualizar o retorno do motor no debug trace do BTP a integração parou de ser chamada, tentamos forçar log causando erro através do communication arrangements com url incorreta, porém ao criarmos pedidos de compras o erro sequer aparece, e não cria Log da ocorrencia, poderia nos auxiliar?

Grato, Thiago.

entry.title: Excel template in BTP BAS tool giving error when deploying app
entry.content:
We are creating an app to upload data from an excel and update the backend custom table using BTP BAS and oData.

To keep the loaded data correct, we are giving option to download a template in excel format and upload the same with relevant data. When trying to deploy the app to ABAP environment with the excel template in BAS, its giving error and not recognizing the template. 

If we remove the template specific code and deploy it to ABAP repository, its getting deployed successfully.

Is there any missing configuration to allow template based excel upload via BAS.

entry.title: Re: planned order basic dates and production dates
entry.content:
hi tn12, Please Check 

 

https://me.sap.com/notes/46237/E

 

For further Details on how Dates are determined.

 

hope this Helps

entry.title: Re: ML_GET_BLOCKED_INFO
entry.content: When you upgraded the version of the MobiLink Server you were using, did you also run the upgrade script in $SQLANY17/MobiLink/upgrade/9.0.[0|1|2]/upgrade_ora.sql file against your consolidated database?

entry.title: Re: ML_GET_BLOCKED_INFO
entry.content:
> This doesn't explain how it works most of the time and fails some of the time though.
This stored procedure is only called when the MobiLink Server is unable to get a lock on a row in the ml_database table at the start of the synchronization. 
This can occur when remote database "X" attempts to synchronize, but the MobiLink server is already processing a synchronization from remote database "X".

entry.title: How to identify test data in Open Data views?
entry.content:
May I know how can I distinguish testmail receiver from the email open data?

I want to collect the email performance data of customers who receive the email after email campaign launch, excluding the testmail data.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to identify test data in Open Data views?
entry.content: A possible way is to link email campaigns V2 view and performance data view using a JOIN (send, click, bounce, others) and filter out the entries which "campaign_type = test".

BananaCode

Code with friends  , debugging  with pets !

entry.title: Fields empty After Saving and empty in Executive review
entry.content:
Hi all,

i might be stupid but I configured a worksheet were the final annual Salary will be summarized for Austrian People different than for others. For Austrians there are 14 monthly salaries, versus 12 for all others.  
I have a Stringfield „geozone“ where I can refer to. 
the Formula for the Final annual Salary Looks Like this: 

If(geozone=‚AUT‘,cust_newmonthlysalary*12+cust_currentmonthlysalary*2,cust_newmonthlysalary*10+cust_currentmonthlysalary*2)

when i type in the Salary increase all fields are calculating correctly. But After i Save the sheet or when i want to Export via Executive Review, the respective Field with the yearly Salary is empty. 
can anybody please give me an idea what could be the matter?  

Thank you in advance 🙂

 

#compensation #successfactors #executivereview

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #17
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and showing demos. 

💡 You can find the slides presented, recordings, and further references from the previous rroundtables in this GitHub repository.


Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • October 22nd, 10:00 - 11:00 AM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join this roundtable
  • Steampunk team: Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment), Iwona Hahn, Burcu Karlidag, Ronny Pahlke (Product Management)

Preliminary Agenda:
  • System landscape setup and costs
  • Pre-upgrade option for 2411 release
  • Planned features for 2411 release
  • Q&A 
Looking forward to meeting you!
 


Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: Re: openSAP has moved: Find over 100 former openSAP courses on the SAP Learning site
entry.content:
@PRR You are looking for two former openSAP courses. 

  • The course "SAP Focused Run – Operations of Hybrid Landscapes" has been migrated to the SAP Learning site. You'll find it here: https://learning.sap.com/courses/sap-focused-run-operations-of-hybrid-landscapes 
  • The course "Managing Java Systems on SAP Netweaver" was already six years old. The content has not been migrated and is not available any longer.

entry.title: Adding custom fields to Manual Storage Bin creation /SCWM/LS01 in EWM.

entry.title: Automating SAP Post-Refresh Steps with SAP GUI Scripting - Part 1
entry.content:
To help you automate SAP post-refresh steps, I'll provide an outline based on commonly used SAP T-codes like SU01, SM21, SE06, SCC4, RZ10, RZ04, and AL11. These are essential T-codes that come into play after refreshing an SAP system. In this article, I will describe how to automate each step using code examples (e.g., scripts or SAP Automation Frameworks such as SAP GUI scripting or ABAP) and explain how it helps reduce manual effort and human errors.

1. Understanding Post-Refresh Steps and Manual Effort

Post-refresh steps in SAP are crucial to ensure that a newly refreshed system (usually from production to quality or development) functions correctly with the required configurations. These steps often include resetting or configuring system settings, adjusting roles and authorizations, and cleaning up logs and profiles.

Manual execution of these steps across multiple systems leads to:

  • Human errors: Mistakes can easily occur, such as setting incorrect parameters or missing a step.
  • Repetitive tasks: Doing the same post-refresh tasks in each system is tedious and time-consuming.
  • Lack of consistency: Different individuals performing these tasks may interpret instructions differently.

By automating post-refresh steps, we reduce manual interaction, ensuring consistent and accurate system configurations, saving time, and avoiding errors.

2. Automation for Each T-Code

Let's now explore automation for each T-code from the provided file, including script examples and how they reduce manual work.

T-Code: SU01 - User Management (Role Adjustment)

Automation Script Example (SAP GUI Scripting):

vbs
Set session = SAPGuiApp.Children(0).Children(0)
session.StartTransaction "SU01"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtS_USER").Text = "USERNAME"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]").Press 'Display user
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subPERSONAS_AREA:SAPLSUU5:0300/txtSU01_ROLES").Text = "NEW_ROLE" 'Assign new role
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").Press 'Save changes

How It Helps:

  • Automates role assignment and user management.
  • Ensures all team members have correct roles in the refreshed system.
  • Reduces errors like assigning wrong roles to users.

T-Code: SM21 - System Log (Log Cleanup)

Automation Script Example (ABAP Report to Delete Logs):

abap
CALL FUNCTION 'RSSM_LOG_DELETE'
  EXPORTING
    log_number = 'ALL' " Deletes all logs
  EXCEPTIONS
    OTHERS = 1.

How It Helps:

  • Automatically cleans up logs after a refresh.
  • Reduces time spent manually reviewing and deleting unnecessary logs.
  • Ensures that the system is fresh with no outdated logs.

T-Code: SE06 - System Change Option (System Change Configuration)

Automation Script Example (SAP GUI Scripting):

vbs
Set session = SAPGuiApp.Children(0).Children(0)
session.StartTransaction "SE06"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/radRAD_MOD_ON").Select
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").Press 'Enable modifications for the system

How It Helps:

  • Automates system change settings.
  • Ensures that system configurations are set correctly after the refresh.
  • Reduces the risk of forgetting to unlock or lock the system for changes.

T-Code: SCC4 - Client Administration (Client Configuration)

Automation Script Example (SAP GUI Scripting):

vbs
Set session = SAPGuiApp.Children(0).Children(0)
session.StartTransaction "SCC4"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/lbl[0]").Press 'Select client
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtPFL_0010-CLIENT_ROLE").Text = "PRODUCTION" 'Set client role
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").Press 'Save changes

How It Helps:

  • Automates the process of setting client roles.
  • Ensures that client-specific settings are accurate after refresh, avoiding improper client roles.
  • Saves time by setting roles programmatically instead of manually.

T-Code: RZ10 - Profile Parameter Management

Automation Script Example (ABAP Script to Change Profile Parameters):

abap
CALL FUNCTION 'RZ10_PARM_MAINTAIN'
  EXPORTING
    profile_name = 'DEFAULT.PFL'
    parameter_name = 'rdisp/mshost'
    parameter_value = 'new_value'
  EXCEPTIONS
    OTHERS = 1.

How It Helps:

  • Ensures that all necessary profile parameters are correctly updated post-refresh.
  • Reduces manual errors in setting parameters by automating the process.
  • Can be scheduled to update multiple parameters at once, saving time.

T-Code: RZ04 - Operation Modes and Instances

Automation Script Example (SAP GUI Scripting):

vbs
Set session = SAPGuiApp.Children(0).Children(0)
session.StartTransaction "RZ04"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txtS_OPER_MODE").Text = "DEFAULT_MODE"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").Press 'Save operation mode

How It Helps:

  • Automates the configuration of operation modes.
  • Ensures that the system switches to the correct operation modes without manual intervention.
  • Reduces the likelihood of incorrect settings that could affect system performance.

T-Code: AL11 - Directory Display

Automation Script Example (SAP GUI Scripting for Directory Check):

vbs
Set session = SAPGuiApp.Children(0).Children(0)
session.StartTransaction "AL11"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtDIR_NAME").Text = "/usr/sap/trans" 'Change to required directory
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").Press 'Display contents of the directory

How It Helps:

  • Automatically checks directory contents to ensure that post-refresh transport or system files are available.
  • Reduces the time spent manually navigating and checking directories.
  • Can be scheduled to run periodically to check directory consistency.

3. Benefits of Automation

By automating these post-refresh steps, several key benefits can be realized:

  • Error Reduction: Automation ensures that each step is executed correctly every time, reducing the likelihood of human error.
  • Time Savings: Scripts run much faster than manual intervention, particularly when dealing with large systems.
  • Consistency: Automated steps ensure consistent execution across systems, leading to predictable outcomes.
  • Audit Trail: Automation scripts can be logged, providing an auditable record of actions taken.

4. Conclusion

Automating SAP post-refresh steps such as user management (SU01), log cleanup (SM21), system change configurations (SE06), and profile updates (RZ10) can significantly reduce the manual effort and errors associated with post-refresh tasks. By using SAP GUI scripting or ABAP automation, these processes can be streamlined, ensuring consistent, accurate, and fast post-refresh operations. Organizations implementing automation for these steps will benefit from increased system stability and reduced downtime.

entry.title: Re: Generative AI with SAP – Part 4 – AI Foundation on SAP BTP
entry.content: Very informative post. Thank you for sharing!

entry.title: Emarsys need to generate API key
entry.content:
We need to generate API keys in both sandbox and production Emarsys. But we don't see the options available to us that the documentation describes. Does something need to be turned on in order to enable the API functionality? Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Emarsys need to generate API key
entry.content:
According to the following SAP Emarsys documentation, you must generate a X-WSSE header based on the API user/pw that Account Owners can create in the platform to authenticate API calls: Authentication | Emarsys Core API Guides

This X-WSSE header should be generated based on the code examples provided at the section "Computing the Password Digest" of the document above. The algorithm generates the entire header based on the Emarsys suite, API user and API password.
